title: Rosa's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Baby Rosa discovers different colored foods throughout her day, from red strawberries to purple grapes, learning colors through delicious snacks with cheerful sound effects and repetitive patterns.

pages.text: Rosa sees red strawberries. Yum yum!

illustration.description: Baby Rosa with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits in a sunny yellow high chair, reaching for bright red strawberries on a white plate. Her eyes are wide with excitement and she's wearing a soft pink bib. The background is a simple cream kitchen with warm natural lighting.
illustration.alt: Baby Rosa reaching for red strawberries in her high chair

pages.text: Rosa munches orange carrots. Crunch crunch!

illustration.description: Rosa happily chewing on bright orange carrot sticks, her cheeks puffed out slightly. She's sitting cross-legged on a soft blue blanket outdoors. Her grandmother, an elderly Black woman with silver hair, sits nearby smiling warmly. Green grass and blue sky create a peaceful background.
illustration.alt: Rosa eating orange carrots on a picnic blanket with grandmother

pages.text: Rosa picks yellow bananas. Squish squish!

illustration.description: Rosa's tiny hands holding a perfectly ripe yellow banana, some squished between her fingers. She's giggling with banana on her face, sitting in her high chair. Her father, a Hispanic man with kind eyes, watches with an amused smile while holding a wet cloth.
illustration.alt: Rosa squishing yellow banana with her hands while father watches

pages.text: Rosa tastes green peas. Pop pop!

illustration.description: Rosa carefully picking up bright green peas one by one with her fingertips, concentrating intensely. Some peas have rolled onto her tray. She's wearing a lime green shirt that matches the peas. The kitchen background shows her mother, an Asian woman, preparing more food.
illustration.alt: Rosa concentrating on eating green peas while mother cooks nearby

pages.text: Rosa loves blue blueberries. Plop plop!

illustration.description: Rosa's face delighted as she drops plump blue blueberries into her mouth, one by one. A few have stained her lips purple-blue. She's in her high chair with a scattered mess of blueberries on the white tray. Soft morning light streams through a nearby window.
illustration.alt: Rosa eating blue blueberries with stained lips and scattered berries

pages.text: Rosa enjoys purple grapes. Squeak squeak!

illustration.description: Rosa holding a cluster of deep purple grapes, biting into one grape while juice runs down her chin. She's sitting on a soft lavender cushion on the floor. Her older brother, a mixed-race boy with freckles, sits beside her also eating grapes from a wooden bowl.
illustration.alt: Rosa and her brother eating purple grapes together on floor cushions

pages.text: Rosa waves at white milk. Glug glug!

illustration.description: Rosa holding a small pink sippy cup with both hands, tilting it to drink creamy white milk. A drop of milk sits on her nose as she pauses to smile. She's in her father's lap on a comfortable brown couch, with soft afternoon light creating a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Rosa drinking white milk from sippy cup while sitting in father's lap

pages.text: Rosa claps for all colors. Hooray hooray!

illustration.description: Rosa clapping her hands with pure joy, surrounded by all the colorful foods from her day arranged on a rainbow-patterned placemat. Her whole family - mother, father, grandmother, and brother - stand behind her chair clapping too, all with warm, loving expressions. Confetti-like sparkles of color float around them.
illustration.alt: Rosa clapping with joy surrounded by colorful foods and her diverse family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound do the carrots make?
questions.explanation: The orange carrots go crunch crunch when Rosa eats them!

questions.question: What does Rosa drink that's white?
questions.explanation: Rosa drinks white milk that goes glug glug!
